title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 336.050 - Examinations to be held — to include what
text:
336.050.  Examinations to be held — to include what. — The board shall hold examinations of applicants for a license as an optometrist at such times and places as it may determine.  The examination of applicants for a license as an optometrist may include both practical demonstrations and written and oral tests, and shall embrace the subjects normally taught in schools of optometry approved by the board.
(RSMo 1939 § 10117, A.L. 2007 H.B. 780 merged with S.B. 308) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13505
